notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Gray reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Seth Halvorsen, assist to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros doubles (14) on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Kyler Fedko scores. Victor Caratini to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Gray reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Gray reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Seth Halvorsen, assist to first baseman TJ Rumfield.

notableEvents.label: Kody Clemens GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Trevor Larnach out at 2nd. Kody Clemens out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cole Carrigg. Kyler Fedko scores. Victor Caratini to 2nd.
